paper.title: DeployBench: Benchmarking LLM Agents for Research Artifact Deployment
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.snapshot_comparison: The paper-time and latest inspected archives contain the same 206 relative file paths. Byte/size comparison found only README.md changed; all 51 task directories and their task.json, setup_reference.sh, verify.sh, and task_parser.py files are archive-identical under this bounded comparison.
official_release.relationship_to_paper: Commit b45062e56e99658ea674c473921346ced5481e01 predates immutable arXiv v1 publication by two days and is the only repository commit returned at or before 2026-06-03T23:59:59Z. Timing and the paper's explicit repository link support treating it as the closest public paper-time snapshot, but do not prove byte identity with the authors' private experiment environment. Commit be8f68a328fe6dcda137d46adb05f330d546d394 is the latest master commit inspected on acquisition and postdates v1 by 27 days.

acquisition_scope: The immutable arXiv v1 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. The title/byline and abstract, central results/conclusion, and final recovery/stopping appendices were inspected to verify coherent extraction through page 25. The official GitHub repository was pinned at the closest public pre-publication commit and the latest inspected master commit; both ZIP archives passed integrity checks, and their task/file inventories were compared. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep paper review, release execution, end-to-end task audit, or validation of author claims.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIPs are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
